text.p: I hereby request for voluntary withdrawal of studentship in Philosophy Department. The brearer; in Department of Philosophy request for withdrawal of studentship due to the fact that I have gained admission into another institution and would not be able to write the second semester tests and examinations of the courses I registered for because the new institution gained admission into resumes 11th January; also lectures would commence; and the examinations which I ought to write in this institution starts 18th January; this implies that, I would resume in my new school before examinations start in this Institution.

Sir, I am requesting for this voluntary withdrawal of studentship because I cannot do two things at the same time, meaning; I cannot be receiving lectures from two different institutions at the same time.
I shall be very grateful if my request is favourably considered.
text.heading: Head of Department's Recommendation
